body:
**Dependency check:** All blocking dependencies are now closed:
- #620 ✓ closed
- #621 ✓ closed  
- #622 ✓ closed

Per the issue description: *"Once #620/#621/#622 are green, this issue should fork into at least three backlog children: subpath routing + Forgejo ROOT_URL / Woodpecker HOST, disinto-chat container scaffold with OAuth gate, and Claude Code sandbox envelope + working-dir scoping."*

This vision issue is ready for the planner to decompose into backlog children.

**Gardener flag:** This issue requires human admin action on Forgejo to resolve — changing branch protection settings on the ops repo. No automated formula can fix Forgejo admin settings.

Proposed options (from issue body):
1. Add `planner-bot` to the merge whitelist in ops repo branch protection
2. Remove branch protection from the ops repo (agents are primary writers)
3. Create an admin-level service token for agents

This is blocking all ops repo writes (planner knowledge, sprint artifacts, vault items).
